truth.papers.A3.title: Effect of cold rolling and subsequent heat treatment on microstructural evolution and mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C-(Ni) based austenitic low-density steels
truth.papers.A3.paper_scope: Investigate the effects of alloy composition, cold rolling and heat treatment temperature on concurrent precipitation of κ-carbide/B2 particles, recrystallization, and mechanical properties in Fe-Mn-Al-C-(Ni) austenitic low-density steels.

prediction.papers.A3.title: Effect of cold rolling and subsequent heat treatment on microstructural evolution and mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C-(Ni) based austenitic low-density steels
prediction.papers.A3.paper_scope: Investigate the synergistic effect of Mn/Ni ratio on concurrent precipitation of κ-carbide/B2 particles and recrystallization, and subsequent mechanical properties including hardness and tensile response in Fe-Mn-Al-C-(Ni) based austenitic low-density steels processed by cold rolling and heat treatment.

truth.alloys.alloy_28mn5ni.alloys_notes: Nickel-containing low-density steel with high Mn.
truth.alloys.alloy_15mn5ni.alloys_notes: Nickel-containing low-density steel with lower Mn.

prediction.alloys.alloy_28mn0ni.alloys_notes: Ni-free low-density steel. In hot rolled condition, single-phase austenite with equiaxed grain size ~5–7 μm and nearly random texture.
prediction.alloys.alloy_28mn5ni.alloys_notes: Hot rolled condition contains γ+B2 two-phase microstructure with ~4% B2 in the form of elongated stringers and polygonal particles.
prediction.alloys.alloy_15mn5ni.alloys_notes: Hot rolled condition contains γ+B2 two-phase microstructure with higher B2 fraction (~12%) than 28Mn5Ni, and lower twin fraction than higher Mn alloys.

truth.processes.proc_28mn0ni_hr.description: Homogenized at 1423 K for 2.5 h and hot rolled at 1323 K.
truth.processes.proc_28mn0ni_hr_cr.description: Homogenized at 1423 K for 2.5 h, hot rolled at 1323 K, then cold rolled to ~50% reduction in thickness at room temperature.
truth.processes.proc_28mn0ni_hr_cr_873.descrip: Homogenized at 1423 K for 2.5 h, hot rolled at 1323 K, cold rolled 50%, then heat treated at 873 K for 1 h followed by water quenching.

prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr.description: Vacuum induction melting, homogenization at 1423 K for 2.5 h, and hot rolling at 1323 K to ~13 mm plate.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr.processes_note: Common primary processing for all three alloys.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr.description: Cold rolling to ~50% reduction in thickness (~6 mm sheets) at room temperature by multiple passes.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr.processes_n: 15Mn5Ni alloy experienced cracking beyond 50% reduction; hence all alloys were limited to 50% for comparison.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_873.descrip: Heat treatment at 873 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_973.descrip: Heat treatment at 973 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.descri: Heat treatment at 1023 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1073.descri: Heat treatment at 1073 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1173.descri: Heat treatment at 1173 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.
prediction.processes.proc_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1273.descri: Heat treatment at 1273 K for 1 h followed by water quenching after 50% cold rolling.

truth.processing_steps.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.me: multiple pass cold rolling at room temperature
truth.processing_steps.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_97: heat treatment at 973 K for 1 h

prediction.processing_steps.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.pr: Multiple passes at room temperature to ~6 mm thickness.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr.pr: Multiple passes at room temperature to ~6 mm thickness.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr.pr: 15Mn5Ni experienced cracking beyond 50% reduction; all alloys limited to 50% for comparison.

truth.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.overall_: Single-phase deformed austenite with planar slip bands; no deformation twinning or martensite.
truth.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.microstr: deformed grains with parallel planar slip bands
truth.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_973.over: Partially recrystallized austenite (recrystallization fraction ~0.4) with nm-sized κ-carbides and intergranular B2.
truth.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_973.micr: Recrystallization fraction: 0.4; twin fraction: 0.1; B2 fraction: 0.05
coarser and inhomogeneous in deformed regions

prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.overall_: Deformed single-phase austenite with planar slip bands; no deformation twinning or martensite transformation.
prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr.microstr: deformed grains with parallel slip bands
prediction.structures.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr.overall_: Deformed two-phase (γ+B2) microstructure; austenite deformed by planar slip; B2 stringers concurrently deformed.
prediction.structures.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr.microstr: deformed grains with parallel slip bands
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr.overall_: Deformed two-phase (γ+B2) microstructure; austenite deformed by planar slip; B2 stringers sheared and fragmented.
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr.microstr: deformed grains with parallel slip bands
stringers sheared and fragmented to ~2 μm thickness at ~35–45° to rolling direction
prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_973.over: Partially recrystallized austenite with intragranular κ-carbides and intergranular B2 particles.
prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_973.micr: fine intragranular in recrystallized regions; coarse in deformed regions
inhomogeneous; coarser in deformed austenite, finer in recrystallized austenite
prediction.structures.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr_973.over: Nearly non-recrystallized austenite with fine intragranular B2, intergranular B2 and κ-carbides.
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_973.over: Nearly non-recrystallized austenite with coarse precipitate-rich zones around deformed grains; high volume fraction of B2 and κ-carbides.
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_973.micr: mostly deformed with coarse precipitate-rich zones
fine intragranular, intergranular and prior stringers
coarser in deformed austenite regions compared to 28Mn0Ni and 28Mn5Ni
prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_1173.ove: Fully recrystallized austenite with significant grain growth; precipitate-free.
prediction.structures.sample_28mn0ni_hr_cr_1173.mic: fully recrystallized equiaxed grains with annealing twins
prediction.structures.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr_1173.ove: Partially recrystallized austenite with decreased intragranular B2 precipitation; prior B2 recovered with bamboo-type morphology and new B2 precipitates.
prediction.structures.sample_28mn5ni_hr_cr_1173.mic: prior recovered stringers with bamboo-type morphology and new precipitates with single crystal type orientations
intragranular with orientation relationship to adjacent γ-grains
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1173.ove: Partially recrystallized austenite with reduced B2 fraction compared to 973 K; complete dissolution of κ-carbides and partial dissolution of B2.
prediction.structures.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1173.mic: reduced fraction of prior stringers and precipitates

truth.interfaces.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.def: Crack propagates along γ/B2 interphase boundaries, leading to quasi-cleavage fracture.
truth.interfaces.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.int: Intergranular cracks observed; cracking initiated at phase boundaries due to large volume fraction of B2 and κ-carbides.
truth.interfaces.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.pha: At 1023 K, high fraction of B2 and κ-carbides at grain boundaries promotes brittle intergranular fracture.

prediction.interfaces.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.int: Crack propagation observed along γ/B2 interphase boundaries in failed tensile specimen of 15Mn5Ni heat treated at 1023 K.
prediction.interfaces.sample_15mn5ni_hr_cr_1023.pha: B2 stringers underwent concurrent deformation, shearing and fragmentation during cold rolling; upon heat treatment prior B2 recovered bamboo-type morphology while new B2 precipitates formed with orientation relationship to adjacent γ-grains.

truth.characterization_methods.sample_28mn0ni_: Hardness increased to ~430 VHN after 50% cold reduction.
Evaluate tensile properties at room temperature
truth.characterization_methods.sample_15mn5ni_: Quasi-cleavage fracture with intergranular cracks along γ/B2 interfaces; microcracks present.

prediction.characterization_methods.sample_28mn5ni_: Two-phase γ+B2 microstructure in cold rolled condition; austenite deformed by planar slip.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_15mn5ni_: Microstructure, phase identification, B2 deformation behavior
B2 stringers underwent concurrent deformation, shearing and fragmentation at ~35–45° to rolling direction.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_28mn0ni_: Phase identification and morphology of κ-carbides and B2
Fine uniformly distributed intragranular κ-carbides in recrystallized regions; inhomogeneous coarser κ-carbides (10–60 nm) in deformed austenite; intergranular B2 particles present.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_15mn5ni_: Fine intragranular B2, intergranular B2 and κ-carbides present; κ-carbides coarser than in 28Mn0Ni and 28Mn5Ni under similar conditions.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_28mn5ni_: Phase identification and composition of B2 and κ-carbides
Fine intragranular B2 (5–20 nm), intergranular B2 (50–200 nm) and κ-carbides present. B2 identified as FeAl-based with significant Mn and Ni.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_28mn0ni_: Maximum tensile elongation to failure of ~86% in fully recrystallized condition at 1173 K.
prediction.characterization_methods.sample_15mn5ni_: Fracture surface analysis and crack path determination
Quasi-cleavage fracture with microcracks; crack propagation along γ/B2 interphase boundaries in 15Mn5Ni heat treated at 1023 K.

truth.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: All three alloys attained similar hardness (~450 VHN) and strength levels after 50% cold reduction, despite different initial hardness.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: B2 stringers in 15Mn5Ni underwent shearing and fragmentation during cold rolling, indicating load sharing by the ordered intermetallic phase.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: 15Mn5Ni alloy exhibited brittle behavior with <1% elongation when heat treated at 973 K and 1023 K, due to high volume fraction of B2 and κ-carbides along grain boundaries.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: In Ni-free LDS, processing temperature window around 973 K is critical to achieve strength-ductility balance; slight increase to 1023 K drastically reduces strength.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: Dislocation-twin interaction and dynamic slip band refinement were identified as dominant strain hardening mechanisms in fully recrystallized alloys.

prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: Hot rolled condition grain sizes for all three alloys were equiaxed γ-matrix of ~5–7 μm with nearly random texture.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: Higher Mn alloys (28Mn0Ni, 28Mn5Ni) contained higher twin fractions (~28–40%) in hot rolled condition than 15Mn5Ni alloy.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: Upon cold rolling, the rate of work hardening in 28Mn0Ni was lower initially but increased rapidly after 30% reduction, eventually saturating to similar hardness (~430–460 VHN) for all three alloys at 50% reduction.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: Recrystallization fraction at 973 K: ~0.4 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.0 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.0 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1073 K: ~0.9 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.1 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.1 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1173 K: ~1.0 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.4 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.5 for 15Mn5Ni.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: Twin fraction at 973 K: ~0.1 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.0 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.0 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1073 K: ~0.5 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.0 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.0 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1173 K: ~0.6 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.35 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.2 for 15Mn5Ni.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_5.value: B2 phase fraction at 973 K: ~0.05 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.1 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.4 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1073 K: ~0.03 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.08 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.3 for 15Mn5Ni; at 1173 K: ~0.0 for 28Mn0Ni, ~0.1 for 28Mn5Ni, ~0.15 for 15Mn5Ni.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_6.value: Grain size of recrystallized austenite at 973 K: 2.5 μm (28Mn0Ni), 1.0 μm (28Mn5Ni), 1.0 μm (15Mn5Ni); at 1073 K: 4.0 μm (28Mn0Ni), 1.0 μm (28Mn5Ni), 1.0 μm (15Mn5Ni); at 1173 K: 40.0 μm (28Mn0Ni), 6.0 μm (28Mn5Ni), 4.0 μm (15Mn5Ni).
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_7.value: 15Mn5Ni alloy heat treated at 973 K and 1023 K behaved as brittle material with tensile elongation <1% and stress-strain curves could not be recorded due to negligible ductility.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_8.value: Strain hardening exponent n values: 28Mn0Ni increased from 0.16 (973 K) to 0.50 (1173 K); both Ni-containing alloys at 1173 K showed n ~0.30.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_9.value: Planar slip activity, dynamic slip band refinement and dislocation-twin interaction were observed as dominant strain hardening mechanisms in fully recrystallized austenite.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_10.value: B2 elemental composition by TEM-EDS in 28Mn5Ni at 973 K: Mn 16.3 wt% (14.7 at%), Al 12.7 wt% (23.3 at%), Ni 24.6 wt% (20.8 at%); at 1173 K Ni content enriched to 26.1–27.5 wt%.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_11.value: B2 elemental composition by TEM-EDS in 15Mn5Ni at 1173 K: Mn 8.7–10.5 wt%, Al 12.8–13.5 wt%, Ni 20.2–22.0 wt%.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_12.value: Engineering and true stress-strain curves are presented in Fig. 9 but exact continuous curve data points are not tabulated in the text and require the image for extraction.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_13.value: Dissolution rate of fine intragranular and intergranular B2 particles was higher than that of B2 stringers during heat treatment.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_14.value: Lowering Mn in Ni-containing LDS reduced the processing temperature window in the two-phase region due to higher volume fraction of B2 and κ-carbide precipitation.
